prs.title: Update apprunner.yaml to switch environment variables from staging to…
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single config file update swapping environment variable values from staging to production — trivial infrastructure change.

prs.title: Release: April 11, 2026 — Schema Refactor, Playbooks, Products, Studio, Credentials & Competitive Intelligence
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Massive release PR spanning 515 files, 38k+ custom lines covering schema refactors, playbooks, products, studio, credentials, and competitive intelligence — clearly weeks of transformative work across the entire platform.

prs.title: formatting
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Two-line formatting-only change in a single component file — purely cosmetic, zero logic change.

prs.title: SM-429: Task table shows start/end dates instead of duration
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small targeted bug fix in TaskTable to display start/end dates instead of duration, confined to a single file with 39 lines.

prs.title: Deduplicate layout queries & restore product collecting UI
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Modest refactor deduplicating layout queries across multiple layout files and restoring product collecting UI, touching 13 files with 126 lines of purposeful structural cleanup.

prs.title: Readiness and playbook UX updates across fundamentals/tasks/products
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major feature PR with 5762 custom lines across 68 files covering readiness collection UX, playbook integration, task/product UI updates, and seeding — a substantial multi-area feature delivery.

prs.title: SM-431: comments out integrated with
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Commenting out 'integrated with' references across 6 files with only 11 lines changed — a trivial suppression/commenting task.

prs.title: SM-426: removes AWS marketplace listing from GTM slide, removes unused GTM slide
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Small cleanup removing AWS Marketplace listing from GTM slide and deleting an unused slide component across 5 files with 13 lines.

prs.title: improves readiness collection, introduces CLI
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Meaningful feature work introducing a readiness CLI, Dockerfile updates, worker integration, and an admin RunReadiness dialog — solid cross-cutting feature across 338 custom lines in 9 files.

prs.title: fixes assessment slides, collector, competitors
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Multi-area bug fix and refactor touching assessment slides, collector logic, competitor/rivals migration, field values, and portfolio table across 13 files — meaningful but bounded corrective work.

prs.title: Ch/refactor/misc
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Significant AI agent refactor spanning chat-agent, multiple sub-agents, tools, state, prompts, and supporting infrastructure across 48 files with 1430 meaningful custom lines.

stories.name: Production Release: April 11, 2026 Platform Milestone
stories.rationale: Packaged the major April 11 release encompassing schema refactor, playbooks, products, studio, credentials, and competitive intelligence into a single deployable milestone.

stories.name: Readiness & Playbook Experience Overhaul
stories.rationale: Unified improvements to the readiness and playbook UX across fundamentals, tasks, and products — including task date/duration display fixes, layout deduplication, and formatting polish.

stories.name: AI Readiness Collection & Developer CLI
stories.rationale: Refactored the AI agent layer and improved readiness data collection while introducing a CLI tool to streamline developer workflows.

stories.name: Assessment Slides, Competitor & Collector Fixes
stories.rationale: Resolved bugs in assessment slide generation, the data collector, and competitor intelligence features to ensure accurate output for end users.

stories.name: GTM Slide Cleanup & Marketplace Listing Removal
stories.rationale: Cleaned up the go-to-market presentation by removing the AWS Marketplace listing and unused GTM slide to keep sales materials current and uncluttered.

stories.name: Disable Integrations Display in UI
stories.rationale: Temporarily commented out the 'integrated with' section to prevent incomplete integration data from surfacing to users.

stories.name: Production Environment Configuration Switch
stories.rationale: Updated App Runner configuration to promote environment variables from staging to production, enabling the live deployment environment.
